items.name: Mr. Cheese 🧀 | Funny Yellow Food Character Bundle
items.description:
An adventurous character who feels right at home in cheesy and crispy worlds. 🧀✨

Meet Mr. Cheese, the ultimate funny food character for your next adventure! Whether you are exploring cheesy worlds or just hanging out with friends, this yellow cheese bundle is designed to stand out.

Perfect for roleplay (RP), meme avatars, and fans of cute food characters. This full body character works great in any R15 compatible game.
